title: oedochloa standleyi
intro: Oedochloa standleyi, also known as Standley's oedochloa, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oedochloa standleyi include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
